text:
おっ、<%me>
こんなところで奇遇だな！

ちぇっ、せっかくゼノと
二人っきりだったのに……

ん？　エコー？
何か言ったか？

な、なんでもない！
<%me>も
こんにちは！　元気そうね！

ここで会えたのも何かの縁だろ。
久しぶりに一緒に任務
行ってみないか？

えっ！？
で、でもゼノ、相手の都合も
あるだろうから、さ……

ああ、そりゃそうか。
どうする？

じー……
じぃー…………
丁重に断る
雰囲気を察し、断る
空気を読まずに、頷く

そっか、残念だな。
じゃあ、また今度な！
そうか、それじゃあ一緒に……

あーっ！
そうだそうだよそうだった！

きみはこれからやることがあるって
この前、言ってたじゃない！

そうでしょ！　そうだったはず！
ね！　ねっ！
お願いっ、二人にさせてっ！

なんだ、予定あったのか。
じゃあしょうがないな。
また今度な！
Hey! Fancy running into you here.

Ugh, and just when I finally had him all
to myself...
Huh? What was that, Echo?
Oh, no, nothing! Hi! You're looking alive!

We shouldn't pass up a chance like this, right?
What do you say we tackle a mission together
again like the old days?

What!? But Zeno, wait!
They're probably busy and all, see, so...
True, true. It's your call, then.
Grrr...
Politely decline
Read Echo's eyes and decline
Nod, ignoring Echo's obvious pleas

No, huh? That's too bad.
Maybe some other time!
Alright then, let's all go and--
Hey! You know what? I just remembered!

You had something really, really important
you said you needed to take care of, right?

Yup! You sure did!
No doubt about it!
Right? Right!?
Please, just let me be alone with him!

Oh, you have other stuff to see to?
Don't let me interrupt, then.
Maybe another time!
